column1: Hey James Spiegel, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
whats good bro i got you! which location were you lookin to book?
nicee yea cancun is lit, its like the staple for spring break
how many ppl in your group so far?
Loved “nicee yea cancun is lit, its like the staple for spring break”
wordd thats a solid squad, we all from the same school?
nicee we had some groups from both of those schools last year, will hook it up with a good group rate
y'all energy is 10/10 def need it lol
putting this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things started?
perfect cool if i send through email? its a little long for text
just sent lmk if it came through brotha
Came through appreciate it looking it at rn
word! I added in a discount for you plus a payment plan so you can split it, dont gotta worry about paying it all up front
James brotha whats good, how we feelin about the options so far?
Can you give me a quote for Rio Santa Fe Cabo
Damn bro we only have 2 rooms left for your week for the Santa Fe
its that time of year, everything is going
What type of crowds do you pull at grand oasis
Grand O is like the epicenter of spring break bro
like the staple spring break spot. gets crazy
What do you know abt it for going there
Bahamas cool too, not as lit as Grand O cancun but we have some groups going there too
Also u mind send me a quote for Bahamas?
Sacred Hearts a big one going there
We are thinking to do Cancun grand oasis
I think you send me the wrong quote bc it has the wrong dates
I agree I think thats the wave bro
whats good bro wanted to make sure those were the dates you wanted?
Yeah those are correct dates just waiting on the boys
Aight bet bet. which spot you feelin the most personally?
feel you. Cancun is so lit bro
nahh bro i always recommend bringing some cash just incase you wanna buy something, also tippin the bartenders goes a long way lol
they'll go to you faster if you tip them day 1, saves you hella time waiting all week lol
Ok word that's good to know thank you
yerr James whats good brotha, how things lookin?
yoo James whats good bro, anyone have any questions or anything?
Sorry studying for finals rn not ghosting you just can't focus on this for a couple more days
All good bro focus on that
James brotha whats good, how'd finals go?
sup brotha i hope finals and the holidays went smoothly, hows things lookin for spring break?
sup! we still lookin to get situated for spring break?
whats up James Spiegel did y'all still need help with spring break or you all set?
All good fam. How's the group lookin
Like would you hop on the phone with my boys?
Yea I got you, when were you thinkin
yerr whats good James, did you still wanna hop on a call?
Yes can I give you an exact time on Monday
Yea word lmk. We'll see what we have avail
yoo James whats good, what time you thinking for today?
(919) 451-3396 call this number his name Luke he is helping me coordinate he will also be otp w the rest of our group
Thank you for putting up with my bs my group as you probably could tell is filled with a bunch of college dudes who are unresponsive
Lol all good fam. lets get y'all all situated so we can turn up
making the reservation for y'all rn
just emailed it over to both of you
hey whenever you get a chance, if you could have everyone upload their flight info so that we can coordinate airport transfers for the group
yoyo, just need Delcan Mason and Connor to get there flight info in
If the US government still has Cancun as a "shelter in place tag" what does your refund policy look like for that
Sup bro, shelter in place applies to the people that are currently there

At the moment hotels and airlines are still operating as normal. The stuff going around is tied to other parts of Mexico, not the Cancun hotel zone where our resorts are. Cancun tourism areas are heavily secured
But what is your refund policy
If anyone wants to cancel we can do so. for a refund you'll submit a claim through Travel Insured if you added on the CFAR plan to your account
np bro any other questions just lmk
If you didn't add CFAR can you still purchase it
If we wanted to change locations could we do that and what would that process look like?
Lmk whenever you get a chance please

yea so at the moment since things are operating as normal in Cancun, the Grand Oasis isnt allowing us to pull confirmed reservations or do any clean swaps. so things are locked in there and trips are operating as scheduled
given whats happening though we are offering our groups that would like a diff option a discounted rate for a 4 night stay in Punta Cana for $400
yea. essentially it'll be an entirely new reservation. we dont have the flexibility to swap from the grand oasis to another resort. only to start a new reservation for the group
Ok can we hop on the phone in 10 min?
sure bro I'll give you a call in 10
Hey spiffy we still calling just have class at 12:15, thanks

Hey spiffy do you mind emailing all we spoke about the insurance plan, the 75-100%, that it won't affect the whole trip, and how the grand oasis won't allow you to pull reservations right now for freee
The parents are asking for it
Hey Spiffy can you call me I have a question about the insurance
Please call whenever you get a chance
Sounds good looking forward to speaking then
hey man had some time open up you avail now?
Connor can send me an email at spiffy@springbreaku.com with one sentence saying he can no longer attend and wants to cancel
yo is Declan on the same flight as anyone? Still need his info
He doesn't care about the fee
betttt lmk if you need anything. turn up
